app.title: Easy SCSModManager
app.placeholder.scaffold: Easy SCSModManager - skeleton only. Phase 1 starts next.
filter.search.placeholder: Search mods by name, author, category...
filter.sort.label: Sort by
filter.sort.name: Name
filter.sort.author: Author
filter.category.label: Category
load_order.misplaced_tooltip: Category {category} - belongs in a different group. Right-click to move it.
mod_card.delete_workshop_tooltip: Workshop mods are managed by Steam - unsubscribe in the Workshop to remove them.
dialog.delete.body_one: "{name}" will be moved to the trash. You can restore it from there.
dialog.delete.body_many: These mods will be moved to the trash:
dialog.delete.warn_heading: Still active in a load order:
dialog.delete.warn_hint_one: The profile will point at a missing mod until you save the list again.
dialog.delete.warn_hint_many: The profiles will point at missing mods until you save the lists again.
dialog.delete.workshop_skipped: {count} Workshop mods are not included - manage those through Steam (unsubscribe).
dialog.delete.failed: Could not move "{name}" to the trash. Nothing was deleted permanently.
active_panel.title: Active mods
active_panel.empty: No active mods. Drag mods from the left to enable.
dialog.save.title: Save active mods
dialog.save.body:
Back up the profile before saving?

Note: {game} must NOT be running - the game would otherwise overwrite profile.sii on exit.
profile_header.backup_tooltip: Create a zip backup of the profile (outside the {game} tree)
profile_header.restore_tooltip: Restore the profile from an earlier backup
status_bar.no_install: No game install detected. Check Settings.
status_bar.active_not_on_disk: '{name}' is active in the profile but not present on disk.
status_bar.workshop_fetched: Pulled {count} preview images from the Steam Workshop.
status_bar.no_backups: No backups yet for this profile - create one first.
dialog.info.title: Mod details
dialog.info.author: Author
dialog.settings.title: Settings
settings.language.label: Language
settings.language.restart_hint: The language applies after a restart.
settings.behaviour.heading: Behaviour
settings.behaviour.grid_click_jump: Clicking a mod in the grid jumps to it in the active list
settings.paths.heading: Game paths (empty = auto-detect)
settings.map_base.heading: Map base (always pinned to the top block)
settings.map_base.hint: Mods whose name contains one of these terms land in the top block automatically (e.g. background map, loading screen).
map_combo.empty_body: There are no mods in the maps area. Nothing to export.
map_combo.invalid_body: This file is not a valid MapCombo.
map_combo.missing_body: You are missing the following maps from this combo:
map_combo.outdated_body: Import done. These maps were built with a newer version:
conflict.tooltip.header_full: Fully overwritten by mods above it:
conflict.tooltip.header_partial: Partly overwritten by mods above it:
compat.incompatible_tooltip: The mod says it is not built for your game version. You can still use it at your own risk.
dialog.extract.title: Extract SCS files
dialog.extract.no_install: No game folder found. Set it in Settings or add files manually.
dialog.restore.title: Restore profile
dialog.restore.warning: Warning: {game} must NOT be running. The game would overwrite the restored profile.sii when it exits.
dialog.restore.confirm_body: The current profile will be overwritten with the backup from {label}. Files that were not in the backup stay untouched.
main_window.unsaved_changes: You have unsaved mod-list changes. Apply or discard them first.
dialog.about.title: About Easy SCSModManager
dialog.switch_game.title: Switch game
dialog.switch_game.body:
There are unsaved changes to the active list. Switching the game will discard them.

Switch anyway?
update.ready_to_install: Downloaded and verified. Restart to install.
update.package_hint: AUR: arrives with your system update. .deb / .rpm / tar.gz: grab the new version from the releases page.
update.up_to_date: You are running the latest version ({version}).
